texto: I found myself when I least expected you- at the same old rocking chair in the room with the same flavor of tea. The only difference was the tea had turned cold, just as life had. And I found myself with an option. I could abandon this tea anytime and make a fresh one. You see?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jasleen Kaur GumberKaur Gumber que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I found myself when I least expected you- at the same old rocking chair in the room with the same…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, discover, identity, com foco em identity e vida.
